title: Lennox International Inc.'s (LII) CEO Todd Teske on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Lennox International Inc. (NYSE:LII ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 25, 2022 9:30 AM ET Company Participants Steve Harrison - Vice President of Investor Relations Todd Teske - Chairman and Interim Chief Executive Officer Joseph Reitmeier - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Nicole DeBlase - Deutsche Bank Julian Mitchell - Barclays Jeff Hammond - KeyBanc Capital Markets Gautam Khanna - Cowen and Company Tim Wojs - Robert W. Baird Brett Linzey - Mizuho Nigel Coe - Wolfe Research John Walsh - Credit Suisse Steve Tusa - J.P.

title: Lennox International (LII) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Lennox (LII) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 16.26% and 4.92%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Why Lennox (LII) Might Surprise This Earnings Season
text: Lennox (LII) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.
